targetModel.note: 5 katmanli model aktif: 4 core layer + ecosystem enterprise extensions. Platform contracts cross-cutting olarak tum katmanlara uygulanir.

summary.note: 12/12 aligned, 0 partial, 97% overall. Tier 2+3 tamamlandi: Cross-family patterns + wayfinding roles component UX tab'a eklendi. Page composition builder (wireframe + region details + metrics) sayfa UX tab'a eklendi. Recipe live flow preview (step viz + lifecycle map + pattern metrics) recipe UX tab'a eklendi. Token preview renderer (color/spacing/typography/radius) foundations UX tab'a eklendi. Chart surfaces (pro_chart + pro_report_builder) ecosystem katalogu'na eklendi.

items.canonicalSurface: theme_tokens + runtime token controls + theme preview/preset lens
items.currentSurface: Foundations tam entegre. Token preview renderer (color/spacing/typography/radius) UX tab'a eklendi. BenchmarkParityPanel + PlatformContractsCompliancePanel quality tab'da aktif. Token visual identity canli on izleme ile goruluyor.
items.antDesignReference: Design token + algorithm + component token modeli
items.muiReference: Theme overrides + CSS vars + density + z-index + customization strategy
items.whyItMatters: AntD/MUI seviyesinde theming yalniz dokuman degil; runtime karar mekanizmasi ve uygulama genelinde tutarlilik kontratidir.
items.nextAction: Token preview live renderer ve theme diff tool ekle.

items.capability: I18n, accessibility, density, motion, auth ve global UX contracts
items.currentSurface: PlatformContractsCompliancePanel tum 5 katmanda aktif. Token preview renderer foundations UX tab'inda. Cross-family patterns component UX tab'inda. Contract + benchmark + governance panelleri tum katmanlarda wire edildi.
items.muiReference: Accessibility + localization + RTL + motion/density customization contract
items.whyItMatters: Ust seviye UI library hissi, farkli componentlerin ortak platform kurallarina uymasiyla olusur.
items.nextAction: CI gate'leri run-time enforce et; contract violation alert dashboard ekle.

items.capability: Component catalog + API contract + docs/demo/adoption yuzeyi
items.canonicalSurface: product tree + component detail shell + API/quality/demo tabs
items.currentSurface: En olgun alan. Cross-family patterns + wayfinding roles UX tab'a eklendi. Adoption metrics (consumer files, tier, stability) quality tab'da. Benchmark + contracts + governance panelleri aktif. Navigation family matrix eslesmeli render ediliyor.
items.whyItMatters: UI library parity'nin omurgasi component catalog kalitesidir.
items.nextAction: Component-level migration cockpit enrichment; automated adoption tier CI gate ekle.

items.capability: Navigation, tabs, menu bar ve wayfinding parity
items.canonicalSurface: navigation family + canonical menu/tabs/navigation rail recipes
items.currentSurface: Cross-family patterns (breadcrumb_tab_sync, command_palette_global, responsive_nav_cascade) artik UX tab'da gorsel olarak render ediliyor. Wayfinding roles legend eklendi. Active match vurgulama ile eslesen pattern'ler one cikiyor. 6 family + 3 cross-family pattern tam gorunur.
items.antDesignReference: Menu, Tabs, Dropdown, Layout navigation surfaces
items.muiReference: App Bar, Tabs, Menus, Navigation components
items.whyItMatters: Buyuk urunlerde kullanicinin sistem algisi navigation kalitesiyle belirlenir.
items.nextAction: Navigation family live preview ve cross-family interaction testi ekle.

items.capability: Data grid, table, tree, scheduler, analytics ve enterprise data surfaces
items.currentSurface: Enterprise data surface catalog (6 surface: pro_data_grid, pro_table, pro_forms, pro_export, kpi_dashboard_builder, admin_dashboard_shell) EcosystemDetailSections'a wire edildi. Her surface icin: coreComponents, capabilities, benchmarkRef (Ant/MUI), apiContract (importPath, propsInterface, dataProvider, serverSideModel), qualityGates, readinessChecks gercek katalog verisinden render ediliyor. Overview>Surfaces paneli surface kartlari + capability badge + readiness bar + cross-surface pattern gosteriyor. API>Contract paneli gercek import path ve server-side model gosteriyor. Quality>Gates paneli katalog quality gate'lerini listeliyor, Quality>Readiness paneli per-surface readiness checklist gosteriyor.
items.muiReference: MUI X Data Grid + advanced data surfaces
items.whyItMatters: Kurumsal admin/product sayfalari icin en pahali karar alanlari data surfaces tarafindadir.
items.nextAction: Chart surfaces icin benchmark backlog genislet; real-time analytics surface catalog'a ekle.

items.capability: Workflow clusters, recipe handoff ve reusable flow layer
items.canonicalSurface: cluster sidebar + recipe hero + flow/binding/quality tabs
items.currentSurface: Recipe workflow catalog (9 pattern, 6 lifecycle state, 10 transition, 4 cluster, 4 dependency edge) wire edildi. Overview>Flow paneli RecipeStateMachineVisualizer ile degistirildi: 6 lifecycle state (idle→configuring→active→reviewing→stable→deprecated), 10 state transition, matched workflow pattern (steps flow + owner blocks + quality gates). Overview'a yeni Dependencies paneli eklendi: RecipeDependencyGraph ile 4 cluster (Data/Decision/Input/System flows), 4 dependency edge (extends/consumes), 9 pattern grid. Quality>Gates paneli RecipeQualityGatesContent ile zenginlesti: complexity-based required gate count, catalog pattern gates + cross-cutting gates (5), source badges (Cross-cutting/Pattern/Custom). RecipesSidebarRenderer workflow-first complexity sinyalleri aktif.
items.antDesignReference: AntD'de first-class recipe layer yok; bu alan bizim fark yaratma alanimiz
items.muiReference: MUI templates ve examples ile dolayli cozuluyor
items.whyItMatters: Bu katman bizim AntD/MUI parity'sini asmamizi saglayacak asil urun farki olabilir.
items.nextAction: Recipe live flow preview demo ve recipe composition playground ekle.

items.canonicalSurface: template gallery + page shell families + page contracts + page preview
items.currentSurface: Pages kendi workspace mode'unda, kendi sidebar renderer'inda (PagesSidebarRenderer) ve kendi URL params setinde calisiyor. Dedicated DesignLabPageDetailSections ile page-specific tab'lar (overview/regions/adoption/gallery, api/contract/regions/dependencies, quality/gates/readiness/governance). Template preview gallery 6 sablon ile aktif (dashboard_kpi, settings_config, detail_review, search_workspace, form_wizard, crud_management). UX tab, governance panel ve gallery paneli eklendi.
items.whyItMatters: Gercek urun seviyesinde UI library, ekiplerin sayfa kurulumunu da hizlandirir.
items.nextAction: Page composition builder ve live template preview renderer ekle.

items.currentSurface: 5 bagimsiz sidebar renderer: FoundationsSidebarRenderer (platform contract sinyalleri), ComponentsSidebarRenderer, RecipesSidebarRenderer (workflow complexity sinyalleri), PagesSidebarRenderer, EcosystemSidebarRenderer (tier breakdown, extension catalog, surface kind classification). Her biri layer-contract-matrix kurallarini enforce eder. Hicbir katman baska katmanin renderer'ini reuse etmiyor.
items.whyItMatters: Kullanici bilgiyi once sidebar'da anlar; yanlis sidebar tum katmanlari birbirine benzetir.
items.nextAction: Sidebar renderer'lara layer-specific arama filtreleme ve context-aware empty state ekle.

items.capability: Katman-bazli hero, tabs, detail panels ve preview shell
items.currentSurface: 5 katman icin tam bagimsiz detail sections: DesignLabFoundationDetailSections (overview/tokens/contracts, api/runtime/schema/consumption, quality/gates/coverage/a11y), DesignLabComponentDetailSections (6 tab), DesignLabRecipeDetailSections (5 tab), DesignLabPageDetailSections (5 tab), DesignLabEcosystemDetailSections (5 tab: general/demo/overview/api/quality, ecosystem-specific guidance, enterprise readiness, API integration patterns). Tum katmanlar renderXDetailContent() pattern'ini takip ediyor.
items.muiReference: Template pages vs component pages vs customization pages ayrimi
items.whyItMatters: Ayni tab yapisi tum katmanlara uygulaninca bilgi yerlesimi anlamsizlasir ve 'corba' hissi olusur.
items.nextAction: Her katman icin UX tab icerigi ekle (suan sadece components icin var).

items.canonicalSurface: data-grid pro, pro forms, charts, page starters, admin shells, optional premium lanes
items.currentSurface: Ecosystem tamamiyla bagimsiz ve enterprise data surface catalog wire edildi. EcosystemSidebarRenderer (tier breakdown, extension catalog, surface kind classification). DesignLabEcosystemDetailSections (5 tab) + enterprise-data-surfaces.v1.json entegrasyonu: Overview>Surfaces gercek surface kartlari (coreComponents, capabilities badge, benchmarkRef, readiness bar, cross-surface patterns), API>Contract gercek import path + serverSideModel + cross-surface patterns, Quality>Gates katalog quality gate'leri + quality matrix, Quality>Readiness per-surface readiness checklist (6 check x 6 surface). Kendi state + URL sync + renderEcosystemDetailContent() aktif.
items.whyItMatters: AntD/MUI farkini acan sey yalniz core component listesi degil; etrafindaki pro ecosystem'tir.
items.nextAction: Chart surfaces ve real-time analytics surface catalog'a ekle; data grid live demo entegrasyonu.

items.capability: Docs, demo, benchmark ve quality gates coverage
items.currentSurface: BenchmarkParityPanel tum 5 katmanin quality tab'ina wire edildi. Her katmanda benchmark capability breakdown (score bar, AntD/MUI reference, next action) gorunur. PlatformContractsCompliancePanel tum katmanlarda aktif. Katman-bazli filtreleme ile ilgili contract ve compliance matrisi goruluyor.
items.antDesignReference: Component docs + design token docs + examples
items.whyItMatters: Parity, yalniz kodla degil karar verdiren docs ve benchmark coverage ile olculur.
items.nextAction: Automated coverage raporu CI pipeline'a ekle; missing benchmark key alert'i implement et.

items.capability: Adoption, migration, release ve governance cockpit
items.canonicalSurface: release/adoption/migration dashboards + owner mapping + codemod lanes
items.currentSurface: Layer-agnostic MigrationGovernancePanel tum 5 katmana wire edildi. 5 governance dimension (breaking_change_tracking, codemod_readiness, version_governance, consumer_impact_analysis, adoption_tracking) x 4 maturity level per-layer render ediliyor. Migration lanes, cross-layer maturity comparison ve next-level hint panelleri aktif. Component overview'daki migration cockpit ile birlikte tam governance coverage.
items.muiReference: Versioned docs and upgrade guidance discipline
items.whyItMatters: Buyuk UI library seviyesinde degisim yonetimi de urunun parcasi olur.
items.nextAction: Codemod readiness maturity'yi Level 3'e cikar; automated adoption tracking ekle.
